questions.question: How does NovaAI's performance review cycle work?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI runs a bi-annual performance review cycle. The mid-year review calibration happens in July with results delivered by July 31. The annual review calibration is in January with results by January 31. Ratings use a 5-point scale (Exceptional, Exceeds Expectations, Meets Expectations, Developing, Unsatisfactory).
